_comment: Strategy parameters. Edit and commit to change daily alert behavior.

rule1._comment: Trailing-drawdown stop. enabled: turn on/off. dropPct: drawdown %. dropWindow: lookback days.

rule2._comment: Vol-spike exit. volDirSMA: 0=off (pure threshold) or 15/20/25/50 for direction confirm.

_alertMode_options: daily = always send a summary; change = only send when state flips; both = daily summary + bold ALERT on flip days
